2606.24799.title: OrbitForge: Text-to-3D Scene Generation via Reconstruction-Anchored Video Synthesis
2606.24799.paper_summary: Generic text-to-video models can be used as rich open-world scene priors. Despite the high quality of today's generated videos, they do not directly yield reliable 3D assets: camera motion is difficult to control, view coverage is partial, and frames often contain inconsistencies across time. We introduce OrbitForge, an adapter built from frozen video priors and per-prompt Gaussian Splatting reconstruction optimization that converts a single text-generated video into a canonical closed-orbit 3D Gaussian Splatting scene. We use 3D reconstruction as an anchor to improve the 3D consistency of the generated video. We obtain a preliminary 3D reconstruction from a first generated video via Deformable Gaussian Splatting with a robust MedianGS proxy. We render views from a prescribed orbit to detect missing viewpoints. OrbitForge uses the text-to-video model to complete only the missing views, and reconstructs the completed orbit into a final Gaussian Splatting scene. This design requires no task-specific video or multiview fine-tuning, avoids per-prompt score-distillation optimization, and does not progressively generate views one step at a time. We further argue that this setting demands coverage-aware evaluation: local smoothness alone rewards methods that never attempt a full orbit. On a frozen 300-prompt T3Bench-derived audit, OrbitForge reconstruction attains a 359.0-degree measured median span, raises originally unsupported-bin Q10 ImageReward from 8.07 to 16.36 relative to MedianGS-only reconstruction, while remaining competitive with VideoMV on the coverage-quality.
2606.24799.paper_summary_zh: 通用的文本到視頻模型可以用作豐富的開放世界場景先驗。儘管當今生成的視頻質量很高，但它們並不直接產生可靠的3D資產：相機運動難以控制，視角覆蓋不全，且幀之間經常存在時間上的不一致。我們介紹了OrbitForge，一個由凍結視頻先驗和每個提示的高斯噴濺重建優化構建的適配器，將單個文本生成的視頻轉換為標準的閉合軌道3D高斯噴濺場景。我們使用3D重建作為錨點，以改善生成視頻的3D一致性。我們通過具有穩健的MedianGS代理的可變形高斯噴濺從第一個生成的視頻獲得初步的3D重建。我們從指定的軌道渲染視圖以檢測缺失的視角。OrbitForge僅使用文本到視頻模型來補全缺失的視角，並將完成的軌道重建為最終的高斯噴濺場景。這種設計不需要特定任務的視頻或多視角的微調，避免了每個提示的分數蒸餾優化，也不會逐步生成視角。我們進一步認為，這一設置要求考慮覆蓋率的評估：僅僅局部平滑會獎勵那些從不嘗試完整軌道的方法。在一個凍結的300提示T3Bench衍生的審核中，OrbitForge重建達到了359.0度的測量中位數跨度，將原本不支持的Q10 ImageReward從8.07提高到16.36，相對於僅使用MedianGS的重建，同時在覆蓋質量上仍然與VideoMV保持競爭力。
2606.24799.author: Chenrui Fan et.al.
